curation_notes: Patch modifies a single file (internal/controller/user_controller.go) in the RetrievePassWord function. The fix changes the response from returning the password reset verification code to returning nil, preventing the code from being leaked in the API response. Pre-assigned class auth-bypass is correct: the vulnerability allows bypassing email-based password reset verification by directly obtaining the reset code from the API response. No sibling locations found; other controller functions do not exhibit the same pattern of leaking sensitive codes.
